mapper.subject: {{8.data.`7h7j0`.value}}'s Automation
mapper.html:
Your Personalized Plan Is Ready!

Hey {{8.data.`7h7j0`.value}}! 👋

I'm excited to share your customized 90-day wellness business plan! Based on your responses, I've created a detailed roadmap tailored specifically for your [BUSINESS_TYPE] business.

Inside your plan, you'll find:

  • 🎯 Week-by-week action steps
  • 📈 Growth strategies for your stage
  • ✅ Clear, achievable milestones
  • ⚡ Quick wins to build momentum

I've attached your complete plan to this email. To make the most of it:

  1. 📥 Download and save your plan
  2. 👀 Review the week 1 action items
  3. 📅 Book your strategy call to discuss your plan

Book Your Strategy Call 🗓️

During our call, we'll:

  • 🎯 Review your immediate priorities
  • 💡 Answer any questions about your plan
  • 🚀 Set you up for success

Can't wait to help you bring this plan to life!

Best wishes,
Jack

If you have any questions before our call, just reply to this email!
